title: What does the "skewed hamburger icon" mean in the left pane?
excerpt: Why is this different from another board? Because it contains a GANTT? Can’t make out why. help please?

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Why is this different from another board? Because it contains a GANTT? Can’t make out why. help please?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Pretty close! Some monday.com templates include icons related to the templates purpose. These were created from project plan board templates, so the icon represents a stylized Gantt chart of sorts.
